Data.Label: Beginning
Values: 25 ABY (60:5 GrS) Skirmish at Helska IV

Data.Label: Outcome
Values: Death of over 365 trillion galactic citizens and widespread devastation
Reformation of the New Republic into the Galactic Alliance
The Galactic Alliance and the Yuuzhan Vong empire sign the Sekot Accords
Self-exile of the Yuuzhan Vong species
